site.title: Outdoor, Lawn & Event Signs | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Custom lawn signs, coroplast signs & event signage printed in-house with flatbed technology. Fast turnaround, durable materials & high-quality results for every occasion.

hero.title: Lawn & Event Signs
hero.imageAlt: Custom lawn signs and event signage

centreText.title: Quick, Reliable & Built To Last
centreText.description: When you need signage that's quick, reliable & built to handle Canadian weather, our signs deliver. With our in-house flatbed printer, we produce high-quality coroplast & rigid signs faster, with sharp detail & consistent colour.

featureImage.imageAlt: Custom coroplast lawn signs and event signage

features.title: Coroplast Lawn Signs That Get Noticed
features.description:
Coroplast signs are lightweight, durable & perfect for outdoor use in all kinds of weather. Available in a range of sizes with optional stakes, these signs are easy to install or mount & built to last.

  • Lawn signs for businesses & services
  • Real estate & open house signage
  • Elections & community campaign signs
  • Contractor & job site signage

For Simcoe County, Muskoka & GTA events, job sites, real estate & more, we get the job done.

features.title: Event Signs For Every Occasion
features.description:
From small gatherings to large community events, good signage helps everything run smoothly. We print all kinds of helpful signs that are easy to read, easy to place & built for indoor or outdoor use.

  • Directional & wayfinding signage
  • Golf tournament & sponsor hole signs or boards
  • Festival & wedding event signage
  • Parking & entrance signs

From setup to guest flow, the right event signs make it easier for everyone to know where to go.

features.title: Flatbed Printing = Fast, Flexible, High Quality
features.description:
Our new, in-house flatbed printer allows us to print directly onto rigid materials with speed & precision. That means fast turnaround times & more control over quality.

  • Coroplast, also known as corrugated plastic
  • PVC & foam board
  • Aluminum & rigid panels
  • Wood & other specialty substrates

With ION Print & Promo, you get consistent, professional results & friendly, local service.
